label: Slow Chad
ref_text: I'm registered in this class. This is U.S. History. Sorry I'm late. It's just like this new schedule is totally confusing. Yeah, I know that dude.
notes: Energy-boundary cuts (whisper word-ends ran early). Dropped leading 'Yeah' (L1) to avoid baking a yeah-pattern; dropped paper tap before 'Sorry' (L4 start 18.92). Residual faint paper taps accepted as good-enough. Hiss not filtered. Reproduce: slice source at cuts_seconds, 25ms edge fades, 0.20s silence between, write PCM_16.
